name: test_get_nonexistent_user_returns_404
description: GET /users/9999 should return 404 for a user that doesn't exist.
descriptionHtml: GET /users/9999 should return 404 for a user that doesn't exist.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent user, got 429
assert 429 == 404
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:
tests/test_users.py:97: in test_get_nonexistent_user_returns_404
    assert response.status_code == 404, (
E   AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent user, got 429
E   assert 429 == 404
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
